name: LoopLens MVP public proof flow
steps: Create a project report with project name, description, repository URL, live app URL, and TestSprite URL.
Paste a two-iteration LOOP.md sample with one failed/fixed iteration.
Parse the loop evidence and confirm editable timeline cards appear.
Switch to Judge Mode and Portfolio Mode.
Accept the redaction checklist and publish the report.
Open the public report URL in a fresh session.
Return to the workspace and verify Markdown export includes project links and timeline evidence.
assertions: The parsed timeline preserves the original LOOP.md source text.
Judge Mode shows evidence completeness, loop count, and fixed failure count.
The public report opens without relying on local browser storage.
Markdown export includes repository URL, live URL, evidence links, and timeline entries.
No critical content overflows on mobile.
